summary: Completed testing of Logo Management feature and Navbar menu color changes. All backend API tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests verified logo display in Navbar and Footer, and menu color changes on slider vs other pages.
passed_tests: Backend - Update all settings at once works
Backend - Clear logo with empty string works
Frontend - Homepage menu items are white/light on slider (rgb(255, 255, 255))
Frontend - Menu items change to dark after scroll (rgb(51, 65, 85))
Frontend - Projects page menu items are dark (non-homepage)
Frontend - Admin Logo tab visible in Content Management
Frontend - Site name input field works
Frontend - Navbar logo upload button present
Frontend - Footer logo upload button present
Frontend - Logo URL input and save works
Frontend - Navbar displays dynamic logo from API
Frontend - Footer displays dynamic logo from API
Frontend - Site name fallback when no logo uploaded
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo management feature fully tested. API endpoints: GET/PUT /api/content/site-settings. Admin panel has Logo tab in Content Management. Navbar menu colors: white on homepage slider, dark on other pages and after scroll. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_logo_management.py

feature_verification.admin_logo_tab: ✓ Visible - First tab in Content Management
feature_verification.navbar_logo_upload: ✓ Working - Button and URL input functional
feature_verification.footer_logo_upload: ✓ Working - Button and URL input functional
feature_verification.navbar_dynamic_logo: ✓ Working - Shows logo or site_name fallback
feature_verification.footer_dynamic_logo: ✓ Working - Shows logo or site_name fallback
